mapper.update: MERGE INTO visits v USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, #{productId} AS product_id FROM dual ) source ON ( v.user_id = source.user_id AND v.product_id = source.product_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( user_id, product_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( source.user_id, source.product_id, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
